user_feedback: when I pause, the text puase shows up and grays out the screen, can you make it so that the game just freezes without the text and graying out
analysis:
- Issue identified: When the game is paused (ESC key), the `drawPausedOverlay()` function displays a semi-transparent gray overlay and "PAUSED" text. The user wants the game to freeze without any visual indication.
- Files affected: ui.js
- Changes needed: Remove the call to `drawPausedOverlay(p)` in the 'PAUSED' game phase case, so the game still freezes (updateGame doesn't run) but renders normally without the overlay.
